title: PilotSwarm EV2 Service Manifest
description: Per-service EV2 manifest consumed by deploy/ev2/ev2-deploy-dev.ps1 (via deploy/ev2/services.json). Paths are relative to deploy/ev2/ unless otherwise noted; kustomizeOverlay is relative to the repo root. Token placeholders: {env} is replaced with the target environment (Dev|Prod), {envLower} with its lowercase form.

_comment.description: Free-form comment for human readers; ignored by tooling.

serviceGroupName.description: Fully-qualified EV2 ServiceGroup name. Must include the {env} token which ev2-deploy-dev.ps1 substitutes with the target environment (e.g. 'Microsoft.PilotSwarm.Worker.{env}').

sgRoot.description: Path to the ServiceGroup root (containing serviceModel.json, rolloutSpec.json, scopeBinding.json, Parameters/, Configuration/, version.txt). Relative to deploy/ev2/.

bicepMain.description: Path to the service's main.bicep (relative to deploy/ev2/). null for services that ship no Bicep (e.g. Worker).

armTemplateOut.description: Path (relative to deploy/ev2/) where 'az bicep build' writes the compiled ARM template consumed by the ServiceGroup's serviceModel.json. null when bicepMain is null.

dockerImageRepo.description: Docker image repository name (no registry prefix, no tag). null for infra-only services. Used by New-DeployPackages to drop 'ContainerImages/<repo>.tar.gz' into the staged EV2 artifact.

dockerfile.description: Path (relative to repo root) to the Dockerfile used when -BuildImage is passed to ev2-deploy-dev.ps1. Only meaningful when dockerImageRepo is non-null.

kustomizeOverlay.description: Path (relative to repo root) to the Kustomize overlay zipped into manifests.zip. Must include the {envLower} token (e.g. 'deploy/gitops/worker/overlays/{envLower}').

defaultRegion.description: Default deployment region. Use 'global' for global/control-plane services.

isInfra.description: true for infra-only ServiceGroups (Bicep-only, no shell-extension app rollout); false for application ServiceGroups that package a container image + gitops manifests.
